ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Lines of code in the method */,
  "cc" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "pc" INTEGER /* Prime complexity of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., create_project, read_project) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role permission was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Total lines of code in the project */,
  "cc" INTEGER /* Total cyclomatic complexity in the project */,
  "pc" INTEGER /* Total prime complexity in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "num_packages" INTEGER /* Number of packages in the project */,
  "num_types" INTEGER /* Number of types in the project */,
  "num_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_metrics" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Total lines of code in the package */,
  "cc" INTEGER /* Total cyclomatic complexity in the package */,
  "pc" INTEGER /* Total prime complexity in the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "num_types" INTEGER /* Number of types in the package */,
  "num_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)
